chunks.text: The Besties welcome Travis Kalanick and Keith Rabois!
Travis on Pony.ai / Uber rumors and the state of Cloud Kitchens
xAI launches Grok 4, learning "The Bitter Lesson" in AI
How Grok can catch ChatGPT in usage, OpenAI's product excellence
Perplexity and OpenAI building AI-native browsers and taking on Chrome
Elon's "America Party": is now the right time for a third party, and could he make an impact in 2026?

SCOTUS backs Trump over federal government RIF plans Follow Keith: https://x.com/rabois Follow Travis: https://x.com/travisk Get The Besties All-In Tequila: https://tequila.allin.com Join us at the
